source_policy: 8 primary volumes from Grade 3A to Grade 6B; child-facing runtime must not expose textbook units, tests, word lists, scores, countdowns or required study gates.

curriculum_items.title: Hello!
sample_phrases: Hello, I am a new friend.
Good morning.

curriculum_items.title: What's your name?
sample_phrases: My name is a story name.
Goodbye.

curriculum_items.title: How old are you?
sample_phrases: Count the soft steps.
How many little flags?

curriculum_items.title: This is my family
sample_phrases: This is a home photo.

curriculum_items.title: Is this your pen?
sample_phrases: Here is a little school bag.

curriculum_items.title: Touch your head
sample_phrases: Wave your hand slowly.

curriculum_items.title: What colour is it?
sample_phrases: The little sign is yellow.

curriculum_items.title: What's this?
sample_phrases: Look at the small animal sign.

curriculum_items.title: I like apples
sample_phrases: I like the apple sticker.

curriculum_items.title: Happy birthday!
sample_phrases: A small card waits on the table.

curriculum_items.title: How are you?
sample_phrases: Good morning. How are you?

curriculum_items.title: What time is it?
sample_phrases: The clock says the day can start slowly.

curriculum_items.title: What's the weather like?
sample_phrases: The weather corner feels warm.

curriculum_items.title: Do you like the dress?
sample_phrases: The window has a soft red cap.

curriculum_items.title: How many kites are there?
sample_phrases: Count the kite ribbons.

curriculum_items.title: There is an egg here
sample_phrases: There is an orange tag on the shelf.

curriculum_items.title: Wash your hands
sample_phrases: Wash hands before snack time.

curriculum_items.title: Children's Day
sample_phrases: We draw a little town picture.

curriculum_items.title: I go there by bus
sample_phrases: We walk to the safe bus sign.

curriculum_items.title: Is she a driver?
sample_phrases: The helper sign tells a town job story.

curriculum_items.title: This is our school
sample_phrases: This is our school gate.

curriculum_items.title: What time do you get up?
sample_phrases: After breakfast, we walk slowly.

curriculum_items.title: I like dumplings
sample_phrases: The shop shelf has a cozy lunch sign.

curriculum_items.title: Look at the elephant
sample_phrases: Look at the animal corner.

curriculum_items.title: Can you play basketball?
sample_phrases: Have a gentle try at the play corner.

curriculum_items.title: What are those?
sample_phrases: Those are tiny garden seeds.

curriculum_items.title: Whose watch is this?
sample_phrases: The little watch waits on the table.

curriculum_items.title: Don't talk in the library
sample_phrases: The book corner stays quiet.

curriculum_items.title: Welcome to my home!
sample_phrases: Welcome to my cozy home.

curriculum_items.title: What's her job?
sample_phrases: A town helper photo tells a story.

curriculum_items.title: It's on your head
sample_phrases: The cap is beside the small box.

curriculum_items.title: What classes do you have this morning?
sample_phrases: The music room sign glows softly.

curriculum_items.title: Today is Wednesday
sample_phrases: Today has a gentle town sign.

curriculum_items.title: Class One gets 54 points
sample_phrases: Count stars without scores.

curriculum_items.title: She helps students
sample_phrases: Mina helps at the gate.

curriculum_items.title: What's your favourite season?
sample_phrases: The park changes with seasons.

curriculum_items.title: What can you see?
sample_phrases: Look at the garden tree.

curriculum_items.title: He is cleaning the window
sample_phrases: The home window is clean.

curriculum_items.title: The Dragon Boat Festival
sample_phrases: The festival sticker waits in the album.

curriculum_items.title: What does that sign mean?
sample_phrases: The gate sign says look slowly.

curriculum_items.title: What does she look like?
sample_phrases: A character portrait joins the album.

curriculum_items.title: I'd like a hamburger
sample_phrases: I'd like a small snack sign.

curriculum_items.title: Do you want some rice?
sample_phrases: Some rice waits on the lunch card.

curriculum_items.title: Can I use your pencil, please?
sample_phrases: Please use the little pencil kindly.

curriculum_items.title: Can I have a pet?
sample_phrases: Sunny has a cozy pet corner.

curriculum_items.title: Which one do you want?
sample_phrases: Choose a gentle color sticker.

curriculum_items.title: What time do you get up?
sample_phrases: The watch helps the morning walk.

curriculum_items.title: Lingling helps her parents
sample_phrases: A small tidy task makes home cozy.

curriculum_items.title: What's your hobby?
sample_phrases: The album keeps a hobby sticker.

curriculum_items.title: What does that sign mean?
sample_phrases: The park sign is friendly.

curriculum_items.title: I'm sorry
sample_phrases: A soft sorry repairs the story.

curriculum_items.title: The Spring Festival
sample_phrases: The town lantern waits in the album.

curriculum_items.title: We're going to read stories
sample_phrases: Story Bear saves a small bookmark.

curriculum_items.title: We're going to do some research
sample_phrases: The library shelf has a question card.

curriculum_items.title: Let's make a kite
sample_phrases: Make a paper kite ribbon.

curriculum_items.title: Don't talk here
sample_phrases: The quiet sign protects the story corner.

curriculum_items.title: When's your birthday?
sample_phrases: A birthday card sits on the home table.

curriculum_items.title: I'll make a beautiful card
sample_phrases: A handmade card goes in the album.

curriculum_items.title: There's a post office near my school
sample_phrases: The street sign sits near school.

curriculum_items.title: Can you show me the way to the Xinhua Hotel?
sample_phrases: The safe path loops back home.

curriculum_items.title: He's kind to children
sample_phrases: A helper leaves a warm note.

curriculum_items.title: Where were you yesterday?
sample_phrases: The album remembers yesterday's walk.

curriculum_items.title: Who was first?
sample_phrases: The path has gentle order markers.

curriculum_items.title: Where did you go?
sample_phrases: A travel postcard stays in the album.

curriculum_items.title: What did you do during the holidays?
sample_phrases: A holiday book joins Story Bear's shelf.

curriculum_items.title: Katie always gets up early
sample_phrases: The morning clock repeats softly.

curriculum_items.title: I like my computer
sample_phrases: Robot sign blinks at the workshop.

curriculum_items.title: The Mid-Autumn Festival is coming
sample_phrases: A moon sticker rests in the town album.

curriculum_items.title: It will be sunny and cool tomorrow
sample_phrases: Tomorrow's weather sign is gentle.

curriculum_items.title: I will bring a big bottle of orange juice
sample_phrases: Orange juice waits in the picnic basket.

curriculum_items.title: What can I do?
sample_phrases: A helper card points to the safe road.

curriculum_items.title: We shouldn't waste water
sample_phrases: The wash corner uses water kindly.

curriculum_items.title: This bird is bigger than the first one
sample_phrases: Two bird stickers sit on the tree.

curriculum_items.title: I don't feel well today
sample_phrases: Rest at home and take it slow.

curriculum_items.title: Shall we go to the theatre?
sample_phrases: The theatre poster invites a look.

curriculum_items.title: It's Christmas again!
sample_phrases: A winter tree sticker glows softly.

curriculum_items.title: A family outing
sample_phrases: A family walk loops safely home.

curriculum_items.title: Some stories are more interesting
sample_phrases: Story Bear compares two gentle books.

curriculum_items.title: We should learn to take care of ourselves
sample_phrases: A care card reminds us to rest.

curriculum_items.title: Planting trees is good for us
sample_phrases: Plant a small town tree sticker.

curriculum_items.title: Our Earth looks like this in space
sample_phrases: The robot corner keeps an Earth picture.

curriculum_items.title: Anne wanted to dance
sample_phrases: Move gently with the music corner.

curriculum_items.title: I'm not afraid!
sample_phrases: Don't worry; the safe path is near.

curriculum_items.title: International Children's Day
sample_phrases: A small town party sticker waits.

curriculum_items.title: Look at these beautiful places in the world
sample_phrases: The far edge shows a postcard wall.

world_mappings.story_memory: Mina waves by the school gate and the little bell remembers the first hello.
world_mappings.visual_hook: school gate bell, morning flag, small hello card
world_mappings.review_path: Start at Home, walk to School Gate, then open the album hello card.
world_mappings.child_facing_line: 早上好，校门的小铃铛在轻轻打招呼。

world_mappings.story_memory: A tiny bag tag follows the Home-School Walk without asking for the child's real name.
world_mappings.visual_hook: soft bag tag, gate ribbon, walking stones
world_mappings.review_path: Look at the path sign between Home and School.
world_mappings.child_facing_line: 小包包陪你走到校门。

world_mappings.story_memory: Kite ribbons make one-to-ten footsteps across the school yard.
world_mappings.visual_hook: kite ribbon with ten soft dots
world_mappings.review_path: Visit School Yard and count ribbon dots slowly.
world_mappings.child_facing_line: 风筝线上有几个小圆点，我们慢慢看。

world_mappings.story_memory: A home photo sits near the Welcome Apple and keeps family words private and gentle.
world_mappings.visual_hook: home photo frame, apple sticker, warm shelf
world_mappings.review_path: Return Home and look at the apple photo corner.
world_mappings.child_facing_line: 家里的小照片在等你回来。

world_mappings.story_memory: A schoolbag charm hangs by the gate as a friendly school thing.
world_mappings.visual_hook: schoolbag charm and gate bell
world_mappings.review_path: Walk to School Gate and check the small charm.
world_mappings.child_facing_line: 校门旁的小包包挂件亮了一下。

world_mappings.story_memory: Sunny waves a paw at the home care corner for head, hand and face words.
world_mappings.visual_hook: paw print, wash cloth, sunny bed
world_mappings.review_path: Visit Sunny's home corner after a walk.
world_mappings.child_facing_line: Sunny 抬起小爪子，像在慢慢挥手。

world_mappings.story_memory: The school activity yo-yo keeps red, blue and yellow ribbons in a tidy box.
world_mappings.visual_hook: yo-yo ribbons and color box
world_mappings.review_path: Look at the school activity corner and album color sticker.
world_mappings.child_facing_line: 活动角的小彩绳收得整整齐齐。

world_mappings.story_memory: Sunny's dog corner starts the first animal path before later animal anchors open.
world_mappings.visual_hook: Sunny, paw prints, soft animal sign
world_mappings.review_path: Return Home and look at Sunny's corner.
world_mappings.child_facing_line: Sunny 在家门口等你看一眼。

world_mappings.story_memory: The Welcome Apple links fruit words to a safe home start.
world_mappings.visual_hook: apple sticker and tiny fruit basket
world_mappings.review_path: Start from Home and later visit the Orange shelf.
world_mappings.child_facing_line: 红苹果贴纸在家门口亮亮的。

world_mappings.story_memory: A birthday card rests under the little watch as a quiet home memory.
world_mappings.visual_hook: small card under watch, gentle candle sticker
world_mappings.review_path: Look at the Home watch table and album card page.
world_mappings.child_facing_line: 小卡片安静地躺在手表旁边。

world_mappings.story_memory: School Gate keeps Good morning and How are you as daily greetings.
world_mappings.visual_hook: gate bell, morning flag
world_mappings.review_path: Home-School Walk to gate greeting.
world_mappings.child_facing_line: 校门说：今天也慢慢来。

world_mappings.story_memory: The Home clock holds school and bed time as cozy routine words.
world_mappings.visual_hook: round clock and watch table
world_mappings.review_path: Look at Clock in the morning and before home rest.
world_mappings.child_facing_line: 圆钟说，今天可以慢慢开始。

world_mappings.story_memory: Sun Patch and Kite keep sunny, rainy and windy as town weather feelings.
world_mappings.visual_hook: sun patch, small cloud, kite ribbon
world_mappings.review_path: Check the weather corner and album clue.
world_mappings.child_facing_line: 阳光小块今天也很温暖。

world_mappings.story_memory: Kite strings hold numbers as soft ribbon dots in the sky.
world_mappings.visual_hook: kite line dots, ribbon shadows
world_mappings.review_path: Visit Kite at School Yard.
world_mappings.child_facing_line: 风筝线上的小点点排成一串。

world_mappings.story_memory: Orange shelf keeps egg, potato, carrot and juice as shop objects.
world_mappings.visual_hook: orange shelf, small food cards
world_mappings.review_path: Open Shop and look at the food shelf.
world_mappings.child_facing_line: 货架上的橙色小标签亮了一下。

world_mappings.story_memory: Sunny's corner links hungry, wash and clean to kind home care.
world_mappings.visual_hook: pet bowl, wash towel, paw print
world_mappings.review_path: Return Home and check Sunny's bowl.
world_mappings.child_facing_line: Sunny 的小碗旁边很干净。

world_mappings.story_memory: School Gate introduces classroom, playground and library as future places from a safe center.
world_mappings.visual_hook: gate sign with tiny room icons
world_mappings.review_path: Stand at School Gate and view the school album page.
world_mappings.child_facing_line: 学校门口的小旗在等你。

world_mappings.story_memory: The watch links breakfast and go to school to a calm walking route.
world_mappings.visual_hook: watch charm on walking sign
world_mappings.review_path: Walk from Home to School and back.
world_mappings.child_facing_line: 我们慢慢走过去。

world_mappings.story_memory: The little watch and pet cap become a kind lost-and-found story.
world_mappings.visual_hook: watch, pet cap, tidy table
world_mappings.review_path: Look at the watch table after visiting Sunny.
world_mappings.child_facing_line: 小手表还在桌角闪着光。

world_mappings.story_memory: Home room words stay inside cozy decoration and album feedback.
world_mappings.visual_hook: home room icons, apple photo frame
world_mappings.review_path: Return Home and open room album page.
world_mappings.child_facing_line: 小屋角落今天也很温暖。

world_mappings.story_memory: Clean window and tidy table connect to slow home decoration.
world_mappings.visual_hook: clean window sparkle, watch table
world_mappings.review_path: Decorate Home and check the clean corner.
world_mappings.child_facing_line: 窗边亮了一点点。

world_mappings.story_memory: Pet language stays with Sunny and never becomes responsibility pressure.
world_mappings.visual_hook: Sunny bed, pet basket, paw heart
world_mappings.review_path: Visit Sunny corner and album pet page.
world_mappings.child_facing_line: Sunny 摇摇尾巴说欢迎回来。

world_mappings.story_memory: Clock and Watch keep routine words on the safe Home-School Walk.
world_mappings.visual_hook: clock sign and walk stones
world_mappings.review_path: Walk past the clock sign.
world_mappings.child_facing_line: 小钟牌提醒大家不用着急。

world_mappings.story_memory: Clothes words live in a shop window as gentle outfit stickers.
world_mappings.visual_hook: hat sign, jacket window, color ribbons
world_mappings.review_path: Visit Clothes Shop window from first ring.
world_mappings.child_facing_line: 橱窗里的小帽子轻轻晃了一下。

world_mappings.story_memory: Story Bear keeps reading content as quiet album stories.
world_mappings.visual_hook: bear book sign, bookmark, warm lamp
world_mappings.review_path: Visit Bookshop and Bear Corner.
world_mappings.child_facing_line: 故事熊给书角留了一盏小灯。

world_mappings.story_memory: Wayfinding words stay at the safe bus sign and loop back home.
world_mappings.visual_hook: bus sign, taxi marker, return arrow
world_mappings.review_path: Look at Bus Stop and return to Home path.
world_mappings.child_facing_line: 站牌旁的小箭头指回熟悉的路。

world_mappings.story_memory: Tree and garden words grow around Fox topiary and resource walks.
world_mappings.visual_hook: fox topiary, small tree, flower path
world_mappings.review_path: Walk through Garden after a daily request.
world_mappings.child_facing_line: 花园转角的小树叶轻轻点头。

world_mappings.story_memory: World place postcards remain far-edge album previews and never block daily life.
world_mappings.visual_hook: postcard wall, zebra edge sign, soft boundary flowers
world_mappings.review_path: Open future album preview from Bus Stop.
world_mappings.child_facing_line: 远处的明信片墙只是在等以后慢慢看。

mainline_segments.title: Home Morning Foundation
mainline_segments.child_facing_frame: 从家里、Sunny 和小桌开始认识小镇。

mainline_segments.title: Home-School Walk Foundation
mainline_segments.child_facing_frame: 从家门口慢慢走到学校门口和操场。

mainline_segments.title: Shop Food Bridge
mainline_segments.child_facing_frame: 路过商店，看见温和的食物小标签。

mainline_segments.title: First Ring Story Expansion
mainline_segments.child_facing_frame: 第一圈只提供故事、花园、车站和橱窗回访。

mainline_segments.title: Future Reserve
mainline_segments.child_facing_frame: 远期内容只进入相册世界感和后续任务预留。
